hero.subtitle: Data & AI Consultancy
hero.description: I partner with industry leaders from Switzerland and Germany to design scalable Data & AI solutions and deploy transformative AI strategies. Delivering measurable results and sustainable value creation.

about.subtitle: My Philosophy
about.p1: Throughout my career, I have partnered with executive teams at global powerhouses like BMW, Mercedes, Volkswagen, LIDL, and REWE. My core strength: bridging the exceedingly rare gap between deep technological expertise and high-level strategic business steering.
about.p2: Whether architecting scalable cloud data platforms on Snowflake, Databricks, and AWS or taking ownership of complex SAFe project deliveries within a challenging stakeholder landscape—I translate digital visions into measurable and deliverable reality.
about.p3: My experience combines Classic Data Analytics, AI Strategy, and Enterprise Data Mesh Transformations. Currently, I am driving the transformation of the financial data ecosystem at PostFinance.

services.subtitle: Core Competencies
services.description: A powerful hybrid of deep technological architecture and strategic business steering. Tailored entirely to your enterprise's transformation.

items.title: Data & AI Strategy & Governance
items.desc: Designing future-proof data strategies and rigorous Data & AI Governance models. I align key business objectives with technological capabilities to frame the blueprint for successful Data Mesh adoptions.

items.title: Cloud Data Platforms & Analytics
items.desc: Architecting and engineering scalable enterprise data ecosystems. From classic Data Analytics (BI, DWH) to implementing modern Lakehouse architectures powered by Snowflake, Databricks, and AWS.

items.title: Enterprise Transformation & Agile Delivery
items.desc: End-to-end management of complex, large-scale cloud transformations. Leveraging profound experience within the SAFe framework and robust stakeholder management, I ensure strategic roadmaps are delivered flawlessly.
Driving digital transformation and architecting modern financial data platforms in Switzerland.
Advised major retail and CPG clients including LIDL and REWE on data strategy, governance, and advanced analytics implementations.
Architected intelligent data solutions and deployed machine learning models for automotive giants like BMW, Mercedes, and Volkswagen.

cta.subtitle: Initiate Contact
cta.description: Whether you need to untangle a complex data landscape or architect a generative AI solution, let's discuss how we can drive measurable impact for your enterprise.

contactPage.title: Initiate Contact
contactPage.description: Leave your details below and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
